data.title: Solana RWA ecosystem value surpasses $1 billion, setting a new record.
data.description: SolanaFloor announced on the X platform that the total value of Solana's RWA ecosystem has exceeded $1 billion, setting a new record.

data.title: Trump Comments on Fed Chair Powell Amid DOJ Investigation
data.description: According to Odaily, U.S. President Donald Trump stated on Wednesday that despite the Department of Justice's criminal investigation into Federal Reserve Chairman Jerome Powell, he currently has no plans to dismiss him. Trump remarked to Reuters that it is too early to determine what actions he might ultimately take. When asked if he would attempt to remove Powell from his position, Trump responded, "I currently have no such plans." Regarding whether the investigation provides a reason for action, Trump added, "At present, we are adopting a wait-and-see approach regarding him, and we are considering our next steps. However, I cannot disclose details. It is too early now."

data.title: ETHGas Completes Discord Community Interaction Snapshot
data.description:
According to Foresight News, ETHGas has announced the completion of its Discord community interaction snapshot. Due to high demand for Gas ID production on the platform, users are required to queue and may need to retry if issues persist. Refreshing the page will not reset or affect the queue position.

Previously, ETHGas stated that a snapshot would be taken on January 19 at 8:00 UTC+8 to determine user eligibility for the 'Genesis Harvest' event. Eligibility will be assessed based on proof of pain, which considers historical Gas fee consumption through Gas ID, social contribution value, and community engagement.

data.title: Polygon Foundation Launches PIP-69 Proposal to Enhance Token Visibility
data.description: According to Odaily, the Polygon Foundation announced on the X platform that the PIP-69 proposal is now live. This proposal allows validator share tokens to be displayed as dPOL at a 1:1 ratio, aiming to improve wallet visibility and expand the utility of staked POL. The dPOL tokens possess full ERC-20 functionality, simplifying the creation of POL liquid staking tokens (LSTs) and enhancing DeFi composability. Users with staked POL will see these tokens in their wallets, which may appear as dPOL, dPOL1, or dPOLa4, depending on the wallet used.

data.title: Base APP to Prioritize Trading in Strategic Shift
data.description: According to PANews, Base APP is set to undergo a strategic shift, focusing primarily on trading to enhance demand and distribution of various assets. Jesse Pollak, co-founder of Base, shared an announcement highlighting three key user feedback points: the app previously emphasized social features excessively, resembling traditional Web2, and lacked support for diverse asset trading; there is a strong market demand for high-quality asset trading; and the information flow should comprehensively display on-chain dynamics, including applications, stocks, prediction markets, and social tokens. In response, Base APP will implement specific adjustments: prioritizing the development of trading functions to drive capital towards rapidly growing asset categories; introducing more high-quality assets on-chain; and adopting a 'finance-first' user experience design that integrates social features, such as copy trading, information flow trading, and leaderboards, on top of financial functionalities.

data.title: US Senate Banking cancels Thursday crypto bill markup amid negotiations
data.description:
Senate Banking Committee Chairman Tim Scott says further negotiations to garner bipartisan support for a key crypto-regulating bill are needed before it can advance.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/us-senate-banking-cancels-thursday-crypto-bill-markup-for-negotiations?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Bitwise Launches Seven Cryptocurrency ETPs on Nasdaq Stockholm
data.description:
According to ChainCatcher, cryptocurrency asset management firm Bitwise announced on January 14, 2026, its listing of seven cryptocurrency exchange-traded products (ETPs) on Nasdaq Stockholm. This move marks Bitwise's official entry into the Nordic market.

The products, denominated in Swedish Krona (SEK), include Bitcoin, Ethereum, Solana, and a diversified crypto asset portfolio. They are designed to offer Swedish investors the opportunity to invest in cryptocurrencies through ISK accounts.

data.title: U.S. Senate Banking Committee Delays Crypto Bill Markup for Further Negotiations
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, the U.S. Senate Banking Committee has postponed its scheduled markup of a crypto market structure bill, originally set for Thursday, due to ongoing negotiations. Committee Chairman Tim Scott announced late Wednesday in Washington, DC, that the delay is necessary to continue bipartisan discussions aimed at securing broader support for the legislation. Scott emphasized the collaborative efforts involved, stating, "I’ve spoken with leaders across the crypto industry, the financial sector, and my Democratic and Republican colleagues, and everyone remains at the table working in good faith." He highlighted that the bill is the result of extensive bipartisan negotiations and incorporates feedback from various stakeholders, including innovators, investors, and law enforcement. The primary objective is to establish clear regulations that protect consumers, enhance national security, and ensure the future of finance is developed within the United States.

The decision to delay follows a similar move by the Senate Agriculture Committee, which also postponed its markup of the crypto bill, initially planned for Thursday, to the end of the month. Republican Senate Agriculture Committee Chairman John Boozman explained that the committee needs additional time to finalize the remaining details and secure the widespread support necessary for the legislation. This series of postponements underscores the complexity and significance of the proposed crypto regulations, as lawmakers strive to balance innovation with consumer protection and national security concerns. The ongoing negotiations reflect the commitment to crafting a comprehensive framework that addresses the diverse interests and challenges associated with the rapidly evolving crypto landscape.

data.title: Genius responded to the platform vulnerability by stating that transaction gas costs have decreased significantly and that BNB cross-chain exchange has been optimized.
data.description: Genius announced on the X platform that some vulnerabilities related to platform transaction issues reported by the community have been fixed, including: - Significantly reduced Gas fees: Fixed the issues of overestimating on-chain Gas limits in EIP-1559 and setting maxPriorityFeePerGas too high; - Optimized BNB cross-chain swaps: Added a small Gas buffer to prevent transaction failures due to insufficient Gas without significantly increasing Gas fees; - Fixed cross-chain transaction fee sponsorship issues using EIP-7702: Updated the process to correctly execute cross-chain transactions sponsored by third parties (no longer exhibiting the old execution issues).

data.title: Lighter introduces mandatory LIT staking for liquidity pool access
data.description:
Lighter announced the new LIT staking feature, now requiring users to stake its native token to access the Lighter Liquidity Pool.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/385696/lighter-lit-staking?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: The US Solana spot ETF saw a net inflow of $23.57 million in a single day.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, the Solana spot ETF saw a total net inflow of $23.57 million yesterday (January 14th, Eastern Time). The largest net inflow among spot SOL ETFs yesterday (January 14th, Eastern Time) was into the Bitwise SOL ETF (BSOL), with a single-day net inflow of $20.86 million and a historical total net inflow of $678 million. This was followed by the Fidelity SOL ETF (FSOL), with a single-day net inflow of $1.73 million and a historical total net inflow of $141 million. As of press time, the Solana spot ETF has a total net asset value of $1.23 billion, a net asset value ratio of 1.47%, and a historical cumulative net inflow of $857 million.

data.title: Morpho Discord Server to Become Read-Only for Enhanced Security
data.description:
According to Foresight News, Morpho team member albist announced on Discord that the Morpho Discord server will switch to read-only mode starting February 1. To provide more secure and reliable support services, all official support and contact channels have been consolidated into the Morpho help page and its chat box.

Morpho co-founder Merlin Egalite commented that Discord is rife with scammers. Despite strict monitoring and security measures, users still face phishing attacks when seeking answers. Recently, the team tested Intercom, which has simplified support tasks with features like instant translation, a help center, AI support bots, and ticket management.

data.title: AI and GPU infrastructure project AGGX raises $2 million in strategic funding.
data.description: AGGX (Adaptive GPU Mesh Sharding), a next-generation GPU and AI computing infrastructure project, announced that it has raised a total of $2 million in its ongoing strategic funding round. This round was led by Ternary LEC Fund, EF Investment & Partners, Spacebar Venture, and two other strategic investors. AGGX's core team comprises AI PhDs and university professors from the United States. Their innovative GPU sharding solution can virtualize a single GPU into more than 30 on-chain nodes, providing scalable, low-latency computing services for GPU-intensive workloads in the Web2 and Web3 ecosystems while improving cost efficiency.

data.title: Robinhood CEO: The U.S. should take a leading role in crypto policy and support the passage of the Market Structure Act.
data.description: Robinhood CEO Vlad Tenev tweeted that staking is one of the most in-demand features on the Robinhood App, but due to the current impasse, customers in four US states are still unable to use it. The stock token is available to EU customers but has not yet launched in the US market. He believes the US should take a leading role in crypto policy through legislation that protects consumers and unleashes innovation for everyone. He supports the efforts of Congress to pass the Market Structures Act, noting that while work remains, a path has been seen, and that he will assist the BankingGOP and Senate Banking in pushing the bill through.

data.title: Trump: Although Powell is facing an investigation, there are no plans to fire him for the time being.
data.description: US President Donald Trump said on Wednesday that despite the Justice Department's ongoing criminal investigation into Federal Reserve Chairman Jerome Powell, he currently has no plans to fire him, and that it is "too early" to determine what action he will ultimately take. When asked if he would attempt to remove Powell from his post, Trump told Reuters, "I don't have any such plans at the moment." When asked if the investigation gave him a reason to take action, Trump added, "Right now, we're taking a deferred approach with him, and we're looking at how to proceed next. But I can't go into details. It's too early to say." (Jinshi)

data.title: Cryptocurrency stocks retreated across the board, with AI stocks falling over 3%, but BTC briefly broke through $97,000.
data.description: On January 15th, according to SoSoValue data, the entire cryptocurrency market saw a pullback. The AI ​​sector fell 3.29% in the past 24 hours. Within the sector, Virtuals Protocol (VIRTUAL) fell 6.51%, while Render (RENDER) and Fartcoin (FARTCOIN) fell 7.29% and 8.75% respectively. However, it's worth noting that Bitcoin (BTC) remained relatively resilient, rising 1.39% against the trend and briefly surpassing $97,000 during the session. Ethereum (ETH) fell 0.05%, remaining above $3,300. In other sectors, the Layer 1 sector fell 0.80% in the last 24 hours, with Zcash (ZEC) rising 4.38% within the sector; the DeFi sector fell 1.11%, but River (RIVER) rose 15.07%; the CeFi sector fell 1.17%, with Bitget Token (BGB) surging 2.29% intraday; the PayFi sector fell 1.40%, with Dash (DASH) bucking the trend and rising 37.95%; the Meme sector fell 2.16%, with Pump.fun (PUMP) rising 5.28%; the Layer 2 sector fell 2.27%, with Movement (MOVE) surging 21.31%; and the crypto sector indices reflecting historical sector performance showed that the ssiAI, ssiNFT, and ssiLayer2 indices fell 3.99%, 3.43%, and 2.77%, respectively.
